visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a patterned bucket hat and a white lace dress over a black mesh top, stands in a brightly lit supermarket aisle. She holds a transparent plastic container of sushi with both hands, smiling at the camera. Behind her, shelves are filled with red-boxed food items under bright artificial lighting. (2) A tight close-up shot displays the contents of the sushi box. It contains several pieces of bright orange sea urchin, translucent pink sweet shrimp, and glossy red salmon roe resting on a bed of white rice with green shiso leaves. Large graphic text overlays appear around the food. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor dining setting. Two women are seated at a gray marble-textured table. One woman is the same from before, and another has straight dark hair and a black top. They hold chopsticks, eating the sushi and gesturing with their hands while looking directly at the camera in a domestic kitchen setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 好市多最新的. (2) [Variety]: 甜蝦海膽散壽司 New. (3) [Variety]: 5個海膽. (4) [Variety]: 然後都跟大拇哥一樣大ya. (5) [Slogan]: 299. (6) [Subtitle]: 我們把它分裝成一份一份. (7) [Subtitle]: 大概可以分四份. (8) [Subtitle]: 這是我裝的. (9) [Subtitle]: 這是阿寶裝的. (10) [Variety]: 滑順不會重口. (11) [Variety]: 很苦澀的味道. (12) [Variety]: 鮭魚的味道. (13) [Variety]: 優等生的範圍. (14) [Variety]: 性價比蠻高. (15) [Variety]: 誠意十足. [Variety]: 嘴裡都是海膽的香氣.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator initially in the store, joined by 1 female friend during the tasting session.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first woman wears a grey patterned bucket hat and a white lace dress over a black top. The second woman has long dark hair and wears a simple black long-sleeved top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a Costco warehouse with refrigerated shelves full of meat or seafood boxes. Transitions to a modern, well-lit indoor apartment with a marble-top dining table and kitchen elements in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks with high arousal and a fast speech rate. The background music is an upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track with a strong, synthesized beat. No significant ambient supermarket noise is heard, suggesting a clean recording or post-production voiceover. (2) A distinct "ding" sound effect triggers as promotional text appears on screen. The female speaker's prosody is highly variable, emphasizing specific words with rising intonation. The electronic BGM continues with a consistent, energetic four-on-the-floor rhythm throughout this segment. (3) Two distinct female voices are now audible, engaging in a lively, casual dialogue. Their tones are animated and humorous. The music ducks slightly to favor the speech. Faint percussive clicks from chopsticks hitting ceramic plates are occasionally heard amidst the conversational chatter. (4) The audio concludes with a energetic closing phrase and a final "pop" sound effect. The BGM maintains its bright, major-mode tonality until the very end, ensuring a consistently positive and high-energy atmosphere for the review.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review and recommend a new seafood sushi product from Costco, highlighting its value, ingredient quality, and taste through a combination of on-site shopping footage and a domestic tasting session.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase with price points and explicit brand naming (Costco).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses high-energy vocals and vibrant text overlays to maintain viewer engagement during a standard product review format.
